heading: Credits or refunds after period of limitation
label: 6514 Credits or refunds after period of limitation
notes: Amendments1976—Subsec. (a)(2). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976—Subsec. (a)(2). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455

children.heading: Credits or refunds after period of limitation
children.label: a Credits or refunds after period of limitation

children.heading: Expiration of period for filing claim
children.label: 1 Expiration of period for filing claim
children.text: If made after the expiration of the period of limitation for filing claim therefor, unless within such period claim was filed; or

children.heading: Disallowance of claim and expiration of period for filing suit
children.label: 2 Disallowance of claim and expiration of period for filing suit
children.text: In the case of a claim filed within the proper time and disallowed by the Secretary, if the credit or refund was made after the expiration of the period of limitation for filing suit, unless within such period suit was begun by the taxpayer.

children.heading: Recovery of erroneous refunds
children.label: 3 Recovery of erroneous refunds
children.text: For procedure by the United States to recover erroneous refunds, see sections 6532(b) and 7405.

children.heading: Credit after period of limitation
children.label: b Credit after period of limitation
children.text: Any credit against a liability in respect of any taxable year shall be void if any payment in respect of such liability would be considered an overpayment under section 6401(a).
